features: 【Applicability】Our car aerial replacement adheres strictly to original factory specifications, making it a choice for 500 models produced from 2012 onwards. With reference OEM numbers 52019353 and 51910790, this replacement antenna is engineered to fit seamlessly with your vehicle. By choosing an aerial that matches the exact requirements of your car, you can enhance performance while maintaining the aesthetic integrity of your vehicle

【Strong Reception】Measuring 7.8 inches in length, this car aerial replacement strikes the balance between style and practicality. The compact design ensures that it fits easily into garages or parking spaces without risking damage to your aerial, while still providing powerful reception quality. Experience uninterrupted radio and multimedia reception, even in adverse weather conditions, as this aerial continues to perform at its best in all scenarios

【 Rubber Construction】Constructed from sturdy, specially formulated flexible rubber, this car aerial replacement is built to withstand extreme conditions and temperatures up to 257 degrees Fahrenheit. The robust material not only provides exceptional durability but also ensures that your aerial can handle a range of environmental factors without compromising its integrity

【Easy to Install】Installing your new car aerial replacement has never been easier, thanks to its user-friendly design. The thoughtful production process ensures that the aerial matches your car perfectly, requiring no complicated tools or technical skills for installation. Whether you're a DIY veteran or a novice, you can confidently replace your aerial with this product, saving time and effort while enjoying improved performance

【Ideal replacement】With our car antenna replacement, you can expect a significant improvement in quality and reception strength. Designed to perform well even in extreme weather conditions, this aerial remains in excellent condition regardless of rain, snow, or intense sun. Say goodbye to weak and disrupted broadcasts, as this aerial is crafted to enhance your driving experience by ensuring you enjoy clear audio and connectivity throughout your journeys
